name: AK3 Default Green Gate
description: Shipped default SonarQube quality-gate profile for AgentKit 3. Carries BOTH a New-Code AND an Overall-Code condition (FK-33 §33.6.3 Broken-Window / Overall-Code invariant). Tolerances live solely here, never in AK code. Project owners may replace this with their own rule set (sonarqube.quality_gate.overrides_allowed).

conditions.rationale: No new violations introduced by the change.
All new security hotspots must be reviewed.

Broken-Window / Overall-Code invariant (FK-33 §33.6.3): zero open non-accepted issues across the whole analysed scope, not merely on new code. Deliberate exceptions are handled via the Accepted-ledger (FK-33 §33.6.4), not by relaxing this condition.
